content:
💡 GameNative | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: Playing PC games on an Android device.
✨ Key Features: • Play PC games on Android • Steam, Epic Games, GOG integration • Cloud saves support • Automatic game image fetching (via SteamGridDB API Key)
📖 Summary: GameNative enables Android users to play PC games from Steam, Epic Games, and GOG directly on their mobile devices. It integrates with these platforms to allow installation and playing of owned games, with support for cloud saves and automatic game image fetching.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ AIPex | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a privacy-focused, integrated AI-powered automation solution for web browsing tasks directly within the user's existing browser, and to enable AI coding agents to control browser actions.
✨ Key Features: • Zero Migration: Operates within your current browser. • Open Source: MIT licensed, transparent, auditable, and extensible.
📖 Summary: AIPex is an open-source browser extension that enables AI-powered automation directly within your existing browser, offering a privacy-first solution without requiring migration to a new browser or workflow. It integrates with AI coding agents via the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for enhanced browser control.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🌟 DebugSwift | Swift
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide iOS developers with an integrated, in-app toolkit for real-time debugging, performance analysis, and interface inspection, simplifying the development and troubleshooting workflow.
✨ Key Features: • Network Inspector (HTTP/WebSocket monitoring, encryption support) • Performance Monitoring (CPU, memory, FPS, leak detection) • App Tools (Crash reports, console logs, device info) • Interface Tools (Grid overlay, view hierarchy, animation control)
📖 Summary: DebugSwift is a comprehensive toolkit for iOS developers, offering a suite of tools to enhance the debugging process. It provides features for network inspection, performance monitoring, app diagnostics, and interface analysis, all accessible within the application itself.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 Personal_AI_Infrastructure | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To serve as a foundational infrastructure for building and deploying agentic AI systems that enhance individual human productivity and capabilities, acting as a personalized digital operating system.
✨ Key Features: • Agentic AI Infrastructure • Human capability augmentation • Personal productivity enhancement • Life Operating System concept • TypeScript and Bun based
📖 Summary: Personal AI Infrastructure (PAI) is a framework designed to augment human capabilities by providing an agentic AI system. It aims to act as a 'Life Operating System,' integrating AI to magnify personal productivity and effectiveness.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
